steps.assistant_text: gl_func_00074AC0 = __osPackRamReadData (io/contramread.c static helper), verbatim at IDO 5.3 -O1, first try. Builds the read-mempack PIF command (tx=3, rx=33, cmd=2, addr<<5|crc, data filled with CONT_CMD_NOP=255, END=254) with channel skew. Its runtime address (0x74AC0+0x1466C=0x8912C) is RamRead's hardcoded jal target. contramread.c COMPLETE -- the entire cont/pfs mempack libultra suite in game_libs is now matched.
